original_reasoning: الثيتل تحامق بعد تغافل، وλήθετε من حقل الخفاء أو النسيان؛ التغافل يقارب الإغفال والذهول.
Greek means 'you were said', and the Arabic gloss includes appearance/disclosure; emergence into speech is a clear conceptual chain.
Arabic طريد carries the sense of one driven out or set apart, and Greek means belonging to another or alien; the chain through estrangement is clear.
واسع منهج points to course or track, which plausibly meets long-course running.

الثن: بلي الهرم (worn out by age, decayed). καταλύω=to dissolve, break down, destroy. Decay/wearing out IS dissolution. Strong semantic parallel: بلي (disintegrate through age) maps directly to κατα-λύω (break apart).

دلل: الدل والدلال=charm, coquetry, الغنج والشكل=flirtation and attractive form. δαιδάλλω=to work cunningly, embellish, adorn. Both center on making something/oneself attractive and appealing. Adorning (δαιδάλλω) produces the charming display (دلال).
Marrara - bitterness vs Myrrh (bitter resin) - direct bitterness match, same Semitic root
Arabic clothing/adornment and Greek purple-dyed share a clear garment-appearance chain.
